1000697523.english: It seems to come regularly from the south. After clearing out these Iron Blooded Beasts, it might be a good idea to send out a reconnaissance team.
1000697523.korean: 남쪽에서 정기적으로 오는 듯하네요. 이번 철충을 정리한 뒤에 정찰을 보내는 게 좋을지도 모르겠어요.

1000697524.english: - I haven't been in Fukuoka for very long, but it feels like the frequency of the Metal Parasite attacks is quite high.
1000697524.korean: - 후쿠오카에 온 지 아직 얼마 안 되었지만, 철충이 오는 횟수가 잦은 것 같은 느낌이 든다.

1000697525.english: - So, Sarena was taking down these Iron Blooded Beasts that come so often all by herself every day?
1000697525.korean: - 사레나는 이렇게 자주 오는 철충을 매일 혼자서 쓰러뜨리고 있던 건가?

1000697526.english: - After finishing the battle command, Armand and I met with Sarena again.
1000697526.korean: - 전투 지휘를 끝내고, 나와 아르망은 다시 사레나와 면담을 했다.

1000697528.english: Yes. Your Majesty has officially decided to film. However, although we're still looking for the shooting data, we haven't found it yet, so I was wondering if we should slightly revise the entire thing and reshoot it.
1000697528.korean: 네. 폐하께서 정식으로 촬영을 결정하셨습니다. 단, 촬영 데이터를 찾고는 있지만, 아직 발견되지 않아서 전체를 조금 수정해서 다시 촬영하는 게 어떨까 해요.

1000697529.english: Re-shooting... is that it...? But is that even possible? There are some sets left, but they're old and... we'd have to rebuild them, right?
1000697529.korean: 재, 재촬영… 인가요… 하지만 그런 게 가능한가요? 남아 있는 세트장이 있긴 하지만, 낡은 데다… 다시 만들어야 하기도 하잖아요?

1000697530.english: Regarding the set and props, we have excellent technicians, so there's no problem.
1000697530.korean: 세트장이나 소품에 관해서는 우수한 기술자가 갖춰져 있으니 문제없어요.

1000697532.english: The only problem is the script. I'm currently exploring Tenran Studio, but I haven't found it. Based on what Ms. Sarena remembers, the script has been rewritten...
1000697532.korean: 한 가지 문제가 있다면, 대본이에요. 현재 텐란 스튜디오를 탐색하고 있지만, 발견되지 않았거든요. 사레나 씨가 기억하고 있는 내용으로 대본을 새로…

1000697533.english: If it's the script, I have it. If you don't mind it being messy...
1000697533.korean: 대본이라면 제가 갖고 있어요. 지저분해도 괜찮으시다면…

1000697534.english: I couldn't put it down, so I kept holding it...
1000697534.korean: 손에서 놓을 수가 없어서 계속 갖고 있었어요…

1000697535.english: - "Sarena said that and then picked up the old script on the desk." Considering how much time has passed, it's in pretty good condition.
1000697535.korean: - 사레나는 그렇게 말하고는 책상 위에 놓인 낡은 대본을 집었다. 상당히 오랜 시간이 흐른 것치고는 꽤 깨끗한 상태다.

1000697537.english: - I received the script from Serena. There were many pieces of paper stuck to the page, and when I opened the marked spot, it was the page where Goltarion VIII appeared.
1000697537.korean: - 사레나에게 대본을 건네받았다. 페이지를 표시하는 종이가 많이 붙어 있었는데, 표시된 곳을 펼쳐 보니 골타리온 Ⅷ세가 등장하는 페이지였다.

1000697538.english: Oh, ahaha... Even tho I only act in death scenes, as an actor, I want to properly portray a death like that of the 8th generation... haha... It's stupid, isn't it? Just for one scene...
1000697538.korean: 아, 아하하… 죽는 장면만 연기하는 거라고는 해도, 배우로서 Ⅷ세의 죽음 같은 걸 제대로 연기하고 싶어서요…하하… 바보 같죠? 고작 한 장면을 위해…

1000697539.english: Yes. I also know well because I'm a Bioroid from the Densetsu company.
1000697539.korean: 네. 저도 덴세츠사의 바이오로이드이기 때문에 잘 알아요.

1000697540.english: Oh, I see... I'm sorry. I think my memory was formatted when I was made into a Siren.
1000697540.korean: 그, 그러셨나요… 죄송해요. 저는 사레나로 만들어질 때 기억이 포맷된 모양이라서…

1000697541.english: Yes. I think it will be okay.

1000697543.english: Yes. That's all I can do, I just need to be able to film the death scene. If you could make good use of this equipment after I'm gone...
1000697543.korean: 네. 저는 그것밖에 할 수 있는 게 없고, 죽는 장면을 찍을 수만 있으면 돼요. 제가 죽은 뒤에는 이 장비를 여러분께서 유용하게 잘 써주신다면…

1000697544.english: No, Ms. Serena will be playing not just the final scene, but Goltarion VIII from beginning to end.
1000697544.korean: 아뇨, 사레나 씨는 마지막 장면 뿐만 아니라, 골타리온 Ⅷ세를 처음부터 끝까지 연기하게 될 거예요.

1000697545.english: - At Armand's words, Serena's eyes widened.

1000697546.english: Huh? What?! No, that's too much! I'm in this shape! Didn't you say the technician was here earlier?! Is there nothing that person can do?
1000697546.korean: 네? 네에?! 무, 무리예요! 저는 이 모양인걸요! 아까 기술자님이 계신다고 하시지 않았나요?! 그 분께서 어떻게 해 주실 수 없는 건가요?

1000697547.english: - If I asked Azaz, it wouldn't be impossible, but... that's a separate matter.
1000697547.korean: - 아자즈에게 부탁하면 불가능하지는 않겠지만… 그건 별개의 이야기다.

1000697548.english: Well, then... if Mr. Faucre is here, doesn't that mean Goltarion is here too? By modifying that...
1000697548.korean: 그, 그렇다면… 뽀끄루 씨가 있다면, 골타리온도 있지 않나요? 그걸 개조해서…

1000697549.english: - To have Goltarion play the role of the 8th generation, we'd have to start by modifying the modules. That would make him someone other than himself.
1000697549.korean: - 골타리온에게 Ⅷ세 역할을 맡기려면, 무려 모듈부터 손을 봐야 하게 된다. 그건 그를 그가 아니게 만드는 일이다.

1000697550.english: - I read the data, and the only difference between Goltarion VIII and Sarena was that from below the chin to above the thighs, Goltarion VIII was naked.
1000697550.korean: - 자료를 읽어 봤는데, 골타리온 Ⅷ와 사레나의 차이는 입 아래부터 허벅지 위까지가 맨몸이라는 것 정도였다.

1000697551.english: - It's natural since I'm using spare parts, but other parts mostly resemble the 8th generation. It would be good to create equipment to cover the exposed parts, but... perhaps it would be better to use this design as the design for Goltarion VIII.
1000697551.korean: - 예비 파츠를 사용하니 당연하다만, 다른 부분은 거의 Ⅷ세의 모습을 하고 있다. 맨몸인 부분을 덮을 장비를 만들어도 좋겠지만… 오히려 이 디자인을 골타리온 Ⅷ세의 디자인으로 해도 좋지 않을까 싶다.

1000697552.english: - Let's hear Hraesvelgr and Faucre's opinions on this matter.
1000697552.korean: - 이 건에 대해서는 흐레스벨그와 뽀끄루의 의견을 들어 보자.

1000697553.english: ...But, someone like me could never be entrusted with such an important role...
1000697553.korean: …하지만, 저 같은 게 그런 중요한 역할을… 맡을 수 있을 리 없어요…

1000697555.english: - Sarena is fidgeting with her hands and looking down.
1000697555.korean: - 사레나는 손을 만지작대며 아래를 보고 있다.

1000697556.english: If I were to reshoot from the beginning, I think the same actor should consistently play the role from start to finish.
1000697556.korean: 저는 처음부터 다시 찍는다면, 처음부터 끝까지 일관되게 같은 배우가 연기해야 한다고 생각해요.

1000697558.english: - I asked on purpose to see Serena's reaction.
1000697558.korean: - 나는 사레나의 반응을 보고 일부러 물었다.

1000697559.english: Yes, as an actor. And as a Bioroid of Densetsu.

1000697560.english: - Then, Sarena slowly raised her head and looked at me.
1000697560.korean: - 그러자 사레나는 천천히 고개를 들어 나를 바라보았다.

1000697561.english: Understood... I'll do my best to act...

1000697563.english: - When I smiled, Serena returned it with a gentle smile of her own.
1000697563.korean: - 내가 미소를 보이자, 사레나도 온화한 미소로 회답해 주었다.

1000697565.english: Okay, so we're starting work for the shoot then. Director.
1000697565.korean: 그럼, 촬영을 위한 작업 개시네요. 감독님.

1000697567.english: - My motivation is burning! Titles are really important, aren't they?
1000697567.korean: - 의욕이 불타는걸! 역시 호칭이란 건 중요하군.

1000697568.english: Huhu... I understand. Please take care of me. Director!

1000697571.english: - When I came to, I was sitting in a chair in an empty room at Tenran Studio.
1000697571.korean: - 정신이 들었을 때, 나는 텐란 스튜디오의 빈방 의자에 앉아 있었다.

1000697573.english: - Her entire body had already been modified to accommodate parts from Goltarion VIII.
1000697573.korean: - 이미 전신은 골타리온 Ⅷ세의 파츠를 붙일 수 있도록 개조되어 있었다.

1000697575.english: - I couldn't tell who I was.

1000697576.english: - All I know is that I was born only for the final performance of Goltarion VIII...
1000697576.korean: - 알 수 있는 것은 '나는 골타리온 Ⅷ세의 최후 연기만을 위해 태어났다'는 것뿐…

1000697577.english: This is it, the android that Dentsu secretly smuggled out from their side... This guy used to be quite popular back in the day... Have you ever seen her?
1000697577.korean: 이거군, 덴세츠 쪽에서 몰래 빼돌려 준 바이오로이드라는 게… 이 녀석도 옛날에는 꽤 인기가 있었는데… 너, 본 적 있나?

1000697578.english: - Someone is talking... Apparently, I was popular.
1000697578.korean: - 누군가가 말하고 있다… 듣자 하니 나는 인기가 있었던 모양이다.

1000697579.english: I'm sorry. Actually, I haven't watched many Densetsu works... If I had to choose, I'd say I prefer Bismark...
1000697579.korean: 죄송합니다. 사실 덴세츠 작품을 별로 안 봐서요… 굳이 따지자면 저는 비스마르크 쪽이…

1000697580.english: - I don't know exactly why, but it seems I shouldn't have said the word "Bismark."
1000697580.korean: - 잘은 몰라도 비스마르크라는 말은 하면 안 됐던 모양이다.

1000697581.english: Oh, so you like Bismark, I see. I like it quite a bit too. It's now called 'Western Densetsu', you know.
1000697581.korean: 아~ 너는 비스마르크를 좋아하나 보군. 나도 제법 좋아해. 지금은 '서양의 덴세츠'라고 불리고 있고 말이지.

1000697582.english: However, don't say things like that in front of someone as important as Chairman Densetsu.
1000697582.korean: 하지만, 그런 말은 덴세츠 회장처럼 높으신 분이 계신 곳에선 하지 말라고.

1000697584.english: I think it's okay to say something is good if it's good, but since it's being made with Densetsu's capital... and they're sensitive these days...
1000697584.korean: 좋은 건 좋다고 해도 된다고 생각하지만, 일단 덴세츠의 자본으로 작품을 만들고 있는 데다… 요즘 예민하거든…

1000697585.english: And just... The chairman is scary... If you upset him, you'll be 'physically' fired or demoted to an extra...
1000697585.korean: 그리고 그냥... 회장님이 무서워… 기분을 거스르면 '물리적으로' 잘리거나 엑스트라 행이다…

1000697587.english: - And it seems the chairman is scary...

1000697588.english: Hey, can you hear me? Android.

1000697591.english: - I'm trying to remember that question... I shouldn't know the answer. I couldn't possibly answer confidently... I didn't know why either...
1000697591.korean: - 그 질문에 떠올리려고 노력한다… 알고 있을 리 없는데. 자신 있게 대답할 수 있을 리가 없는데… 왜인지는 나도 알 수 없었다…

1000697593.english: - I was overcome by a feeling like I couldn't breathe when I tried to speak, so I stopped.
1000697593.korean: - 말을 하려고 하면 숨이 막히는 듯한, 그런 감각에 휩싸여서 그만두었다.

1000697595.english: Tch... They really wiped their memory clean... I said anything would be fine as long as they moved, but this is troublesome...
1000697595.korean: 쳇… 정말로 기억을 전부 지워버렸군… 움직이기만 한다면 뭐든 좋다고는 했지만 귀찮게 됐는걸…

1000697598.english: - After saying that, the director scratched his head and made a thoughtful face.
1000697598.korean: - 감독님은 그렇게 말하고는 머리를 긁으며 고민하는 듯한 얼굴을 했다.

1000697599.english: Oh, okay. It's a choking fit.

1000697603.english: When it was delivered, the box had an 'S' written on it, right? That's it.
1000697603.korean: 운반되어 올 때 상자에 'S'라고 적혀 있었잖아? 그거야.

1000697604.english: Ah... come to think of it, it was written there. Was it the S in Sacrifice?
1000697604.korean: 아아… 그러고 보니 써 있었지요. 새크리파이스의 S였던가요?

1000697605.english: So, is it a sacrifice for the work? Those Densetsu guys have terrible taste, don't they?
1000697605.korean: 작품에 바치는 희생양이라는 건가? 덴세츠 녀석들, 취향 한번 지독하군 그래.

1000697606.english: Well, it'll only be for a little while, but please take care of me.

1000697607.english: Yes... I look forward to working with you as well...

1000697608.english: - I replied. I thought this person was kind. It didn't matter, they just gave a name to an actor who was there to die.
1000697608.korean: - 나는 대답했다. 이 사람은 상냥한 분이라고 생각했다. 아무래도 좋을, 그저 죽기 위해 있는 배우에게 이름을 주었다.

1000697609.english: - The thought that they were going to call me by my name... even in this situation, I could feel a little bit relieved.
1000697609.korean: - 나를 나로 불러 주려고 한다는 생각에… 이런 상황이지만 조금이나마 다행이라고 생각할 수 있었다.

1000697612.english: Starting today, you should practice moving around with all your equipment on for the final scene filming. So you don't make mistakes in important real-world situations. And memorize the entire script.
1000697612.korean: 너는 오늘부터 마지막 장면의 촬영을 위해 장비를 전부 착용하고 움직이는 연습을 해라. 중요한 실전에서 실수하지 않도록 말이야. 그리고 대본을 전부 외워.

1000697613.english: The module already has the instructions on how to move in my head, and I understand that I don't have any lines...
1000697613.korean: 어떻게 움직여야 하는지는 이미 모듈에 의해 머릿속에 들어있고, 저에게는 대사가 없는 걸로 압니다만…

1000697614.english: That's right. However, you are not the true Goltarion VIII. You're just a beginner actor who only inputs the movements later.
1000697614.korean: 그렇지. 하지만, 너는 진짜 골타리온 Ⅷ세가 아니야. 나중에 움직임을 모듈로 입력했을 뿐인 초짜 배우지.

1000697616.english: You see, the androids in Densetsu live as themselves. That's why it has a true flavor.
1000697616.korean: 덴세츠의 바이오로이드는 말이야, 본인이 본인으로서 살아간다. 그렇기에 진실한 맛이 있지.

1000697617.english: No matter what I do, everything is true, and I live by the facts, so I'm unshaken... But what happens when a half-baked imitation like you gets mixed in? It feels out of place.
1000697617.korean: 뭘 하든 모든 게 진실이고, 사실을 살아가고 있으니 흔들림이 없다… 하지만 그 사이에 너 같은 어설프게 흉내만 낸 녀석이 섞여 있으면 어떻게 되겠어? 위화감이 생긴다고.

1000697618.english: But I only get stabbed in the final scene, right?
1000697618.korean: 하지만 저는 마지막 장면에서 칼에 찔릴 뿐… 이잖아요?

1000697619.english: Okay. If things stay this way, it won't be Goltarion VIII who gets stabbed, but you.
1000697619.korean: 그래. 지금 이대로라면 골타리온 Ⅷ세가 아니라 네가 찔리겠지.

1000697621.english: You're not the only one who isn't real in this movie. Got it? Everyone is living their lives desperately. To blend in there, you have to act desperately.
1000697621.korean: 이 영화 속에서 너만 진짜가 아니야. 알겠어? 다들 필사적으로 인생을 살고 있다. 거기 녹아들기 위해서는 필사적으로 연기해야만 한다.

1000697622.english: If you go in without being desperate, it will be obvious that you are VIII, and you will be exposed. Suddenly, sincerity turns suspicious.
1000697622.korean: 필사적이 아닌 네가 들어간다면, Ⅷ가 너라는 건 분명 티가 날 거고, 들킬 거다. 진실성이 갑자기 수상함으로 변하는 거다.

1000697623.english: Even if it's just the death scene, as an actor, play the death of Goltarion VIII.
1000697623.korean: 죽는 장면뿐이라고 해도, 배우로서 골타리온 Ⅷ세의 죽음을 연기해라.

1000697624.english: Become Goltarion VIII. You need to practice, even for that. Fortunately, there's still time until filming starts. Before filming, possess your body with Goltarion VIII.
1000697624.korean: 골타리온 Ⅷ세가 돼라. 그걸 위해서라도 연습해야 해. 다행히 아직 촬영까지는 시간이 있다. 촬영 전까지 몸에 골타리온 Ⅷ세를 빙의시켜 둬.

1000697626.english: Oh, why am I having this conversation with a Bioroid...?
1000697626.korean: 아~ 왜 나는 바이오로이드 상대로 이런 얘길 하고 있지…

1000697628.english: - It was shocking. This person is serious... They're finding meaning in me, who was created simply to be thoroughly consumed for the sake of filming a single scene.
1000697628.korean: - 충격이었다. 이 사람은 진심이다… 그저 한 장면을 찍기 위해, 철저히 소모되는 용도로 만들어졌을 뿐인 나에게서 의미를 찾고 있다.

1000697629.english: - I was also properly a part of what this person was trying to create.
1000697629.korean: - 이 사람이 만들고자 하는 것에, 나도 제대로 그 일부로 들어가 있었다.

1000697630.english: - As I thought that, something like hope bloomed within me. I thought I would live for that moment.
1000697630.korean: - 그렇게 생각하자 내 안에 희망 같은 것이 피어났다. 그 순간을 위해 살아가자고 생각했다.

1000697632.english: Hey, Serena. It looks like we'll be filming next week based on the schedule, how does that sound?
1000697632.korean: 이봐, 사레나. 스케쥴 상 다음 주에 촬영하게 될 것 같은데, 어때?

1000697633.english: Director! Good morning. Now it's perfect!

1000697634.english: Okay. Okay. The script too... It's tattered.

1000697635.english: Yes. Acting is such an exciting thing. I'm looking forward to the shoot. Thank you so much for entrusting me with such an important role!
1000697635.korean: 네. 연기한다는 건 이렇게나 설레는 일이었네요. 촬영이 기대돼요. 이런 중요한 역할을 맡겨 주셔서… 정말 감사합니다!

1000697636.english: - When I said that, the director smiled with pleasure.
1000697636.korean: - 내가 그렇게 말하자, 감독님은 기쁜 듯 웃어 주었다.

1000697637.english: Okay. I'm glad you're Goltarion VIII too. Thank you.
1000697637.korean: 그래. 나도 네가 골타리온 Ⅷ세라서 다행이라고 생각해. 고맙다.

1000697638.english: Hehehe... It's a shame I won't be able to see the finished product, but my acting will be seen by people all over the world, right?
1000697638.korean: 에헤헤… 완성된 작품을 볼 수 없다는 건 아쉽지만 제 연기를 전 세계 사람들이 보는 거죠?

1000697639.english: Okay. I'm also putting my heart and soul into making it, so it's sure to be a big hit.
1000697639.korean: 그래. 나도 온 마음을 담아 만들고 있으니, 분명 크게 흥행할 거다.

1000697640.english: Then I'll act with all my heart too!
1000697640.korean: 그렇다면 저도 온 마음을 담아서 연기할게요!

1000697641.english: - I think I was probably happy. Humans need me, have goals, and fans all over the world watch my acting...
1000697641.korean: - 나는 아마 행복했던 것 같다. 인간이 나를 필요로 하고, 목표를 갖고, 전 세계의 팬들이 내 연기를 봐 준다…

1000697642.english: - In this world, there are many androids who are used and discarded as if it's natural for humans, who aren't even thanked, and who are exposed to violence... I deeply thought in my heart that I am happy because I am thanked and recognized.
1000697642.korean: - 이 세계에는 인간에게 당연하다는 듯 쓰고 버려지고, 감사조차 받지 못하고, 폭력에 노출되는 바이오로이드가 아주 많은데… 감사받고 인정받는 나는 행복한 거라고 마음속 깊이 생각했다.

1000697643.english: (On the day of the shoot, at a large studio)

1000697644.english: - I come to the studio early in the morning to prepare the equipment for Goltarion VIII. In a few hours, I will be murdered.
1000697644.korean: - 이른 아침부터 스튜디오에 와서 골타리온 Ⅷ세의 장비를 준비한다. 앞으로 몇 시간 뒤, 나는 살해당한다.

1000697646.english: - A mark like a laser was etched near the heart in the chest. Momo's sword will be plunged here.
1000697646.korean: - 가슴의 심장 근처에 레이저 같은 것으로 표시가 새겨졌다. 여기에 모모의 칼이 박힐 것이다.

1000697647.english: - Honestly, I didn't feel any fear at all. I was so excited, the most exhilarated I'd ever been in my life. As time passed, the pounding of my heart grew louder.
1000697647.korean: - 솔직히 공포는 전혀 느껴지지 않았다. 기대돼서, 인생 최고로 고양되어 있었다. 시간이 지날수록 심장의 고동이 커졌다.

1000697648.english: - The studio was gradually filling up with people, who were silently preparing equipment and other things... Everyone is working to film me. Just that alone made me inexplicably happy.
1000697648.korean: - 스튜디오에는 점점 사람이 늘어났고, 기재 등을 묵묵히 준비하고 있었다… 모두가 나를 찍기 위해 일하고 있다. 그것만으로도 공연히 기뻤다.

1000697651.english: - And then Momo and the Great Demon King Faucre entered the studio.
1000697651.korean: - 그리고 모모 씨와 뽀끄루 대마왕 씨가 스튜디오에 들어왔다.

1000697653.english: - The person who will kill me today.

1000697654.english: - Well, I don't know... but I felt a sharp pain in my heart.
1000697654.korean: - 뭐랄까… 잘 모르겠지만, 심장이 따끔따끔한 느낌이 들었다.

1000697655.english: Oh, Serena. Are you nervous? You're holding your hand over your chest.
1000697655.korean: 오, 사레나. 가슴에 손을 올리고 있는 걸 보니 긴장한 건가?

1000697657.english: Good morning. Oh, you've already made your mark. Finally, it's the real thing! Don't be too nervous. Just do it like you practiced.
1000697657.korean: 좋은 아침. 오, 벌써 표시도 새겼군. 드디어 실전이구나! 너무 긴장하지 마. 연습한 대로 하면 돼.

1000697658.english: After you fight Momo, just focus on acting out the scene where you die from Momo's Magical Jin Shining Thrust.
1000697658.korean: 너는 모모와 싸운 뒤, 모모의 매지컬 진 샤이닝 찌르기를 맞고 죽는 장면을 연기하는 것에만 집중해.

1000697659.english: Got it? You're getting hit with the True Shining Thrust at the end.
1000697659.korean: 알겠어? 진 샤이닝 찌르기를 마지막에 맞는 거야.

1000697661.korean: 그럼, 촬영이 시작될 때까지 긴장을 풀어 둬.

1000697665.english: Thank you for everything... until now!

1000697666.english: Why are you talking like it's all over? The filming is just starting now, isn't it? Get it over with in one go?
1000697666.korean: 뭘 다 끝난 것처럼 말하는 거야. 촬영은 이제부터잖아. 한 번에 끝내라?

1000697668.english: - I gave the director a smile, the last one I would ever wear. However, it was impossible to know if the director had seen that smiling face. Because at that moment, the staff's screams echoed throughout the studio...
1000697668.korean: - 나는 마지막이 될 웃는 얼굴을 감독님을 향해 지어보였다. 하지만, 그 웃는 얼굴을 감독님이 보셨는지는 알 수 없었다. 그 순간 스태프의 비명이 스튜디오에 울려 퍼졌기 때문에…

1000697669.english: Ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh, ugh

1000697673.english: - The staff member who had opened the door leading outside and was shouting was grabbed by something and dragged out.
1000697673.korean: - 밖으로 통하는 문을 열고 소리 지르던 스태프가 무언가에 붙잡혀 밖으로 끌려 나갔다.

1000697674.english: - After that, gunshots rang out and the screams of many people were heard from outside the studio.
1000697674.korean: - 그 후, 총성이 울리고 많은 사람의 비명이 스튜디오 밖에서 들려왔다.

1000697677.english: Nobody go outside! Lock the door! ...Sarena!
1000697677.korean: 아무도 밖으로 나가지 마! 문을 잠가! …사레나!

1000697679.english: Protect the studio! You can do it!
1000697679.korean: 스튜디오를 지켜! 너라면 할 수 있다!

1000697681.english: Momo! Moonbit is in the waiting room! Bring it!

1000697683.korean: 가, 감독님~! 어, 어떻게 된 일인가요~?

1000697684.english: How would I know? You guys fight too if something happens!
1000697684.korean: 내가 알 리가 없잖아! 너희도 무슨 일이 생기면 싸워!!

1000697686.english: - At that moment, a staff member near the door screamed.
1000697686.korean: - 그때, 문 가까이에 있던 스태프가 비명을 질렀다.

1000697687.english: Kiyyyaaaaaaak!! AGS broke through the door...

1000697689.english: - A bizarre form of AGS grabbed and tore apart the staff.
1000697689.korean: - 기묘한 형태의 AGS가 스태프를 잡아채 찢어발겼다.

1000697692.english: - They barely managed to destroy the rampaging AGS, but most of the staff were killed.
1000697692.korean: - 겨우겨우 폭주한 AGS를 파괴했으나 스태프들은 대부분 죽고 말았다.

1000697693.english: - Momo and Faucre chased BaekTo, who had run outside, and left the studio.
1000697693.korean: - 모모 씨와 뽀끄루 씨는 밖으로 뛰쳐나간 백토 씨를 쫓아 스튜디오를 나갔다.

1000697695.english: - When I looked in the direction of the voice, the director was lying on the ground, covered in blood.
1000697695.korean: - 목소리가 난 쪽을 바라보자, 감독님이 피투성이가 된 채 쓰러져 있었다.

1000697697.english: - I rushed over, but the director's body was so mangled that I couldn't even tell where the fatal wound was.
1000697697.korean: - 서둘러 다가갔지만, 감독님의 몸은 어디가 치명상인지도 알 수 없을 정도로 엉망진창이었다.

1000697698.english: That was a great... move... Please do that during the filming too...
1000697698.korean: 멋진… 움직임이었어… 촬영 때도 그렇게만 해 줘…

1000697699.english: ...Yes. But today... I don't think I can shoot... If we don't heal the director's body...
1000697699.korean: …네. 하지만 오늘은… 촬영은 힘들 것 같네요... 감독님의 몸을 치료하지 않으면…

1000697700.english: Okay... Momo and Faucre have also gone somewhere...

1000697704.english: Did I do something wrong? ...If this were a movie... I must have... made some kind of... mistake...
1000697704.korean: 내가 뭔가 잘못했나? …이게 영화라면… 내가 뭔가 잘못을… 저지른… 것일 테지…

1000697705.english: No... the director is a good person. You didn't do anything wrong.
1000697705.korean: 아니요… 감독님은 선한 분이세요. 잘못 같은 건 하지 않으셨어요.

1000697706.english: Right? Reality is... things like this just happen suddenly... cruelly...
1000697706.korean: 그렇지? 현실이란 건… 갑자기 이런 일이 일어난단 말이야… 잔혹하게도…

1000697708.english: - The director seemed to smile slightly, then his lips trembled as if he were frustrated.
1000697708.korean: - 감독님은 살짝 웃는가 싶더니 분한 듯 입술을 떨었다.

1000697709.english: and die... I don't want to...

1000697714.english: - This is the room the human lent me. Perhaps because it's been a while since I heard the word "director," I had a dream about the old days.
1000697714.korean: - 이곳은 인간님께서 빌려주신 방. 오랜만에 '감독님'이라는 말을 들어서일까, 옛날 꿈을 꾸고 말았다.

1000697715.english: - Since then, following the words "Protect the studio," Momo and her group have continued to protect the studio.
1000697715.korean: - 그 후로 '스튜디오를 지켜라'라는 말을 따라 모모 일행과 계속해서 스튜디오를 지켜 왔다.

1000697717.english: - Honestly, I wish that order hadn't been given... It might have been different if it had been something like "Protect me"...
1000697717.korean: - 솔직히 말해서 그 명령은 내리지 않았으면 했다… 적어도 "나를 지켜라" 같은 거였다면 또 달라졌을지도 모른다…

1000697718.english: - But... I think the director just wanted to protect the place where they were filming the movie...
1000697718.korean: - 하지만… 감독님은 영화를 찍는 장소를 지키고 싶었던 거라는 걸…

1000697720.english: - Saying that, I got out of bed.

1000697721.english: - I held a strategy meeting for the movie shoot. We came to this city in the first place for supplies, so we didn't intend to stay long.
1000697721.korean: - 나는 영화 촬영을 위해 작전 회의를 열었다. 애당초 이 도시에는 보급을 목적으로 온 것이기 때문에, 오래 눌러앉을 생각은 없었다.

1000697722.english: - Therefore, filming needs to proceed as quickly as possible. The technical team had to push themselves a bit to speed things up, but thanks to Armand negotiating beforehand, they readily agreed to my request.
1000697722.korean: - 그렇기에 촬영도 가능한 한 빠르게 진행할 필요가 있다. 속도를 내기 위해 기술팀이 조금 무리해 줘야 했지만 아르망이 사전에 교섭해 준 덕분에 내 부탁을 흔쾌히 승낙해 주었다.

1000697723.english: - And it was also found that Metal Parasites regularly approach the factory south of Fukuoka. It must also be dealt with to avoid disrupting the filming.
1000697723.korean: - 그리고 후쿠오카 남쪽에 있는 공장에서 정기적으로 철충이 접근해 온다는 것도 판명되었다. 촬영을 방해하게 두지 않기 위해서도 대처해야만 한다.

1000697724.english: - We plan to establish a base after completely securing the Tenran Studio and its surroundings to prepare for the attack and ensure smooth filming.
1000697724.korean: - 공격 준비와 원활한 촬영을 위해 텐란 스튜디오와 그 주변을 완전히 확보한 후 기지를 구축할 생각이다.

1000697725.english: - The filming will, of course, take place at Tenran Studio. There was quite a lot to do, but thanks to the low number of Iron Blooded Beasts, the operation difficulty was considerably lower.
1000697725.korean: - 촬영은 물론 텐란 스튜디오에서 진행한다. 할 일이 상당히 많지만, 철충이 적은 덕분에 작전 난이도는 제법 낮아져 있었다.

1000697726.english: - I'm going to be busy for a while!

1000697727.english: To be continued in Part 2 of "Sincerely, Your Wedge."

1000697728.english: Good job, Griffon. How was the street situation?

1000697730.english: Griffon, if you say so, it's fine.

1000697731.english: Yeah. I'll ask Valhalla to take care of the basement.

1000697735.english: What's wrong? Reconnaissance reports are data...

1000697741.english: Okay. I'll only allow you to go to the areas we've secured.
1000697741.korean: 알겠어. 확보한 지역에 한해 가는 것을 허가할게.

1000697742.english: So, the location of that holy site on the map—

1000697744.english: Thank you. I'll keep that in mind...

1000697747.english: Why is it cleaner than other cities?

1000697749.english: ...So it's highly likely someone is fighting.

1000697750.english: Where do you want to investigate?

1000697751.english: Were you waiting here and then defeated the Metal Parasite?
1000697751.korean: 여기서 기다리고 있다가 철충을 쓰러뜨린 건가?

1000697752.english: Okay. Let's secure this place first and investigate.

1000697760.english: Okay. I was wondering if you had any idea what might have happened.
1000697760.korean: 그래. 뭔가 짐작 가는 건 없을까 해서.

1000697762.english: Okay. It's also possible that it's a new character we haven't discovered yet.
1000697762.korean: 그래. 아직 발견한 적 없는 새로운 인물일 가능성도 있어.

1000697763.english: Ah... the two of you wait here, at this spot.

1000697764.english: If it's a magical girl, there's a chance they might attack Faucre without warning.
1000697764.korean: 그게 만약 마법소녀라면, 다짜고짜 뽀끄루를 공격할 가능성이 있어.

1000697765.english: If it's the Demon King's army, they might attack Momo without warning.
1000697765.korean: 만약 마왕군이라면, 다짜고짜 모모를 공격할 가능성이 있고.

1000697766.english: No, it's possible it's a new character, so we don't know what might be there.
1000697766.korean: 아니, 새로운 인물일 가능성이 있으니, 뭐가 있을지는 몰라.

1000697767.english: Wasn't it a big deal during the Moonbit era?

1000697768.english: Yeah. I'll be counting on you then.

1000697769.english: As expected, it's coming to this... Ground forces, prepare for battle.
1000697769.korean: 역시 이렇게 되는군… 지상 부대, 전투 준비.

1000697770.english: Everyone, don't let your guard down. Just in case!
1000697770.korean: 다들 경계를 늦추지 마. 만약의 사태에 대비해!

1000697771.english: I can see it here too...

1000697774.english: Just for filming the last scene?

1000697776.english: Huh? You've taken all the photos?

1000697779.english: Haa... So, you're not accepting the structure?
1000697779.korean: 하아... 그래서, 구조를 받아들이지 않고 있다고?

1000697781.english: Don't worry about it. I want to talk to Serena. What's the situation?
1000697781.korean: 신경 쓰지 마. 사레나와 대화하고 싶어. 어떤 상황이지?

1000697783.english: Are you saying you don't want to leave the studio?
1000697783.korean: 스튜디오를 떠나고 싶지 않아 하는 건가?

1000697784.english: Armand, how should I give orders in this situation?
1000697784.korean: 아르망, 이런 경우에는 어떻게 명령해야 할까?

1000697786.english: It might be sudden, but I heard the story.

1000697787.english: You don't have to guard the studio anymore. Come to Orca.
1000697787.korean: 더 이상 스튜디오를 지키지 않아도 돼. 오르카로 와.

1000697789.english: Harpyia, bring Sarena to the Orca Hole.
1000697789.korean: 하르페이아, 사레나를 오르카 호로 데려와 줘.

1000697791.english: You've worked hard. If it's the child you rescued, they're currently being examined by the doctor.
1000697791.korean: 수고가 많아. 구조한 아이라면 지금 닥터에게 검진을 받고 있어.

1000697796.english: Yeah. I'm sorry. Anyway, please wait for now.
1000697796.korean: 응. 미안해. 어쨌든 지금은 기다려 줘.

1000697797.english: That's great. I have a question...
1000697797.korean: 잘 됐다. 물어보고 싶은 게 있는데…

1000697798.english: Yeah. There are just too many things that are bothering me...

1000697801.english: So... does that mean there are still things I don't know...?
1000697801.korean: 즉… 아직 모르는 게 있다는 건가…?

1000697804.english: Yeah, I guess so. But first, I'll need to have the interview.
1000697804.korean: 응, 그렇겠지. 하지만 일단 면담이 먼저겠군.

1000697805.english: Nice to meet you. Okay, sit down.

1000697809.english: Don't worry about it. It's because I like Dentsu's work.
1000697809.korean: 신경 쓰지 마. 덴세츠 작품을 좋아해서 그래.

1000697810.english: There are many ways. If you just want to finish it, you don't necessarily have to...
1000697810.korean: 방법은 많아. 완성하고 싶은 것뿐이라면 굳이…

1000697812.english: Sarena, you want to act out that scene, right?
1000697812.korean: 사레나, 너는 그 장면을 연기하고 싶은 거지?

1000697813.english: You said you were ordered to act out a murder scene, right?
1000697813.korean: 너는 살해되는 장면을 연기하라는 명령을 받았다고 했지?

1000697815.english: Come to think of it, you did the sword fighting scene in Zero and Kaen's play, didn't you?
1000697815.korean: 그러고 보니 제로와 카엔의 연극에서 칼싸움 연기를 했었지?

1000697820.english: Hraesvelgr, could you check the computer's status?
1000697820.korean: 흐레스벨그, 컴퓨터의 상태를 봐줄 수 있을까?

1000697821.english: If it's broken, could you find the script—
1000697821.korean: 혹시 망가져 있다면 대본을 찾아 주—

1000697823.english: I haven't said anything yet, have I?
1000697823.korean: 나 아직 아무 말도 안 했는데?

1000697824.english: Yes, that's right. Please call me the director for a while.
1000697824.korean: 응, 그 말이 맞아. 한동안 나를 감독이라고 불러줘.

1000697825.english: Okay. Anyway, you're quite the character.

1000697827.english: That's great, thanks. That would be a big help.

1000697829.english: Anyway, if you've read this diligently, you should be fine.

1000697830.english: I'd like to entrust you with the role of Goltarion VIII.
1000697830.korean: 골타리온 Ⅷ세 역할은 네게 맡기고 싶어.

1000697831.english: Even so, there's no time to make an VIII.
1000697831.korean: 아무리 그래도 Ⅷ세를 만들 시간은 없어.

1000697832.english: There is a Goltarion, but it's Goltarion XIII.

1000697833.english: You read the script so diligently, so you'll be fine.
1000697833.korean: 이렇게 성실하게 대본을 읽었으니 괜찮을 거야.

1000697834.english: Haha, is that your opinion as the actor Armand?

1000697835.english: Yeah. Please take care of me.

1000697840.english: - Because the film festival was organized so suddenly, I was a little worried, but our reliable team members prepared for and enjoyed the festival in their own ways.
1000697840.korean: - 갑작스러운 영화제 개최였기에 조금 불안했지만 우리의 믿음직한 대원들은 각자의 방식으로 영화제를 준비하고 즐겼다.

1000697841.english: - Fortune and the technical team manufactured the equipment needed for filming, and opened an old-era film museum.
1000697841.korean: - 포츈을 비롯한 기술진들은 영화 촬영에 필요한 장비들을 제조하고, 옛 시대 영화 박물관을 개관했고.

1000697842.english: Huh? Mr. Azaz. Did they have equipment like this in the old days?
1000697842.korean: 어라? 아자즈 님. 이런 장비가 옛 시대에 있었나요?

1000697843.english: Oh, you saw it exactly right.

1000697844.english: I took the equipment apart to maintain it, and suddenly I had an inspiration, you know?
1000697844.korean: 장비를 정비하기위해서 분해를 했는데 갑자기 영감이 생긴 거 있죠?

1000697845.english: So I made a slight modification.

1000697846.english: I've upgraded the equipment's specs to around the level of current-generation equipment.
1000697846.korean: 장비의 스펙을 현 시대 장비 정도까지 끌어올렸어요.

1000697847.english: And if you press this button here, for security reasons...
1000697847.korean: 그리고 여기에 있는 이 버튼을 누르면 보안을 위해서……

1000697848.english: What the heck! What is this liquid?

1000697849.english: Why is this suddenly coming out of the equipment?
1000697849.korean: 이런 게 왜 갑자기 장비에서 뿜어져 나오는 건데?

1000697850.english: Ugh! What is this? Why is it so sticky?
1000697850.korean: 윽! 뭐야, 이거 왜 이리 끈적끈적해?

1000697851.english: Why does this feature even exist?

1000697856.english: This doesn't seem right, even for you, Azaz.
1000697856.korean: 이건 아무리 아자즈 님이라도 아닌 거 같아요.

1000697857.english: - The film shooting also went smoothly.

1000697859.english: When I needed to film a scene with rain, I thought I was lucky because it was raining at that moment...
1000697859.korean: 비가 내리는 장면을 찍어야 할 때, 마침 비가 와서 운이 좋았다고 생각했는데…

1000697860.english: Won't the schedule be affected if it keeps raining like this?
1000697860.korean: 이렇게 계속 비가 내리면 일정에 차질이 생기지 않나요?

1000697862.english: We've already filmed all the scenes we could even if it rained...
1000697862.korean: 비가 와도 찍을 수 있는 장면은 이미 다 찍었고…

1000697864.english: I'll be right back, I'm just going to the fairy dorms for a moment.
1000697864.korean: 나 잠시만 페어리 숙소에 갔다 올게.

1000697866.english: I should ask Rhea to change the weather again.
1000697866.korean: 레아한테 한 번 더 날씨 좀 바꿔달라고 해야겠어.

1000697868.english: Wait a moment. So, this rain, could it be that you asked Ms. Rhea to do it?
1000697868.korean: 잠깐. 그러면 이 비도 설마 레아 씨에게 부탁했던 건가요?

1000697869.english: Oh, you're as smart as you need to be to become a teacher, aren't you?
1000697869.korean: 오~ 역시 선생님이 될 만큼 똑똑한데?

1000697870.english: Oh my goodness! Do you change the weather just because you're filming a movie?

1000697871.english: It's like using a cleaver to kill a chicken!
1000697871.korean: 닭 잡는데 소 잡는 칼을 쓰는 꼴이잖아요!

1000697872.english: If you needed a scene with rain, you could have used a rain machine to make it rain!
1000697872.korean: 비 내리는 장면이 필요하면 비를 뿌리는 강우기를 써도 됐잖아요!

1000697873.english: That's how sincere they are, right?

1000697874.english: No, even if you say that here, it doesn't resonate with me at all.
1000697874.korean: 아니, 여기서 그런 말을 하셔도 전혀 마음에 안 와닿거든요?

1000697875.english: Doesn't that mean you're only getting what you deserve by not being able to film right now?
1000697875.korean: 지금 촬영 못하는 것도 자업자득이라는 뜻이잖아요!

1000697876.english: We're already moving toward the future, so there's no time to look back.
1000697876.korean: 과거를 돌아보기에는 우리는 이미 미래를 향하고 있어.

1000697877.english: Even if you say something that sounds plausible, it's ultimately just empty words, isn't it?
1000697877.korean: 뭔가 그럴싸하게 말해도 결국에는 실속이 없는 말인데요?

1000697879.english: What is Ms. Olivia saying again?
1000697879.korean: 올리비아 씨는 또 무슨 소리를 하시는 건가요?

1000697881.english: Just like a brownie's best friend...

1000697882.english: Alright, there's nothing we can do about what's already happened.
1000697882.korean: 자자, 이미 일어난 일은 어쩔 수 없으니까.

1000697883.english: Let's just do the script reading.

1000697886.english: Sister, you haven't finished your quota yet, so why are you here?
1000697886.korean: 언니 할당량 아직 다 못 채웠으면서 여기 있는 거야?

1000697887.english: Didn't I say you're not allowed outside until you've filled your quota?
1000697887.korean: 할당량 다 채우기 전까지는 절대로 밖에 안 내보낸다고 했지?

1000697889.english: No, Audrey. Wait a minute! Wait a minute! I need to be on set, you know?
1000697889.korean: 아니, 오드리. 잠깐만! 잠깐! 나 촬영현장에 있어야 하거든?

1000697890.english: Sister, you should be in the studio, not on set right now!
1000697890.korean: 지금 언니가 있어야 하는 곳은 촬영현장이 아니라 작업실이야!

1000697891.english: Do you have any idea how many requests have piled up right now?

1000697892.english: Among them, there are some costumes that my sister deliberately made complicated because she insisted on it!
1000697892.korean: 그 중에는 언니가 고집 부려서 일부러 복잡하게 만든 의상도 있다고!

1000697893.english: Wait a minute! Then at least let me work here!
1000697893.korean: 잠깐만! 그러면 적어도 여기서 일할 수 있게 해줘!

1000697894.english: I want to see you filming a movie too!
1000697894.korean: 나도 영화 찍는 거 보고 싶다고!

1000697895.english: Who told you not to look?

1000697897.english: Stay up all night like Taylor!

1000697900.english: - And preparations were also progressing smoothly to make the film festival a celebration for everyone.
1000697900.korean: - 그리고 영화제를 모두를 위한 축제로 만들기 위한 준비도 착착 진행되고 있었다.

1000697902.english: Since Aurora made the dessert, there's no fault to be found in its taste, is there?
1000697902.korean: 아우로라가 만든 디저트이니 맛에선 흠잡을 데가 없지 않사옵니까.

1000697904.english: However, what we need to create now is a dessert that an 'ordinary android' can 'make' and 'sell' at a 'food court'.
1000697904.korean: 하지만 지금 우리가 만들어야 하는 건 ‘푸드코트’에서 ‘평범한 바이오로이드’가 ‘만들어서’ ‘팔 수 있는’ 디저트입니다.

1000697905.english: This dessert, which requires so much effort and skill, is disqualified.
1000697905.korean: 이렇게 손이 많이가고 기술이 필요한 디저트는 실격이옵니다.

1000697906.english: Huh? I chose something that would be as easy as possible to make, didn't I?
1000697906.korean: 네? 최대한 쉽게 만들 수 있는 것으로 했는데요?

1000697907.english: That would be true according to your standards. However, Aurora is certainly no ordinary android when it comes to desserts, is she?
1000697907.korean: 당신의 기준에서는 그렇겠지요. 허나 아우로라는 디저트에 관해서는 결코 평범한 바이오로이드가 아니지 않사옵니까.

1000697908.english: Even for an ordinary android, this is too much.

1000697917.english: Sweet and salty foods have always been popular. It's not difficult to make, it doesn't smell or make much noise, and it's easy to eat, so it's a food that fits the purpose of the film festival.
1000697917.korean: 달고 짠 음식은 언제나 인기가 있었고. 만드는 것도 어렵지 않고, 냄새나 소리도 많이 안 나고, 간편하게 먹을 수 있는 음식이니 영화제의 취지에 맞는 음식이로군요.

1000697925.english: - Of course, preparing for the film festival didn't mean neglecting my existing work.
1000697925.korean: - 물론 영화제를 준비한다고 기존의 업무를 소홀히 하지는 않았다.

1000697930.english: But even if we don't see each other for just one day, I miss you.
1000697930.korean: 하지만 하루만 만나지 못해도 보고 싶어지는걸요.

1000697931.english: Because we've been together for so long.

1000697932.english: Didn't you want to meet the Black Wyrm?

1000697935.english: Oh, and speaking of that, I have a question about the distribution of surplus food this time.
1000697935.korean: 아, 그러고보니 이번 잉여 식량 분배 건에 관해서 여쭤볼 것이 있습니다.

1000697937.english: ...May I ask how you've been doing lately?

1000697939.english: Shall we go somewhere comfortable, relax, and have a cup of tea while we talk?
1000697939.korean: 어디 편한데서 느긋하게 차나 한 잔 하면서 이야기를 나누도록 할까요?

1000697940.english: - Although it was said that Europe had become Orca's sphere of influence, a significant portion of Europe was still under the influence of the Iron Blood.
1000697940.korean: - 유럽이 오르카의 세력권이 되었다고는 했지만 유럽의 적지 않은 구역은 아직 철충의 영향권에 있었다.

1000697945.english: If you want to know, you have to pay the price.

1000697947.english: I haven't said anything yet, have I?

1000697948.english: Because you always said the same thing.

1000697950.english: Hey, what's wrong? Valhalla stockpiles alcohol in preparation for the harsh winter, right?
1000697950.korean: 에이, 왜 이래? 발할라는 혹한기 대비로 술을 비축해두잖아.

1000697951.english: I won't ask for a lot. Just a few bottles to quench my thirst.
1000697951.korean: 많이 달라고는 안 할 게. 그냥 목 축일 정도로 서너 병만.

1000697952.english: Didn't you go berserk in the Ferrofluid Zone last time?
1000697952.korean: 그랬다가 지난 번에 철충 구역에서 폭주하지 않으셨습니까?

1000697953.english: Thanks to you, we were able to drag out those Iron Bugs that were holed up inside. Didn't you? If the result is good, it's all good.
1000697953.korean: 덕분에 꽁꽁 틀어박혀 있던 철충들 끌어냈잖아. 안 그래? 결과가 좋으면 모두 좋다고.

1000697954.english: And didn't you get completely drunk last time and lose your bike?
1000697954.korean: 또 지난 번에는 만취해서 바이크도 잃어버리지 않으셨습니까?

1000697955.english: Well, it's the guy who rode it who's bad, not the person who lost it!
1000697955.korean: 그, 그건 타고 간 녀석이 나쁜 거지, 잃어버린 사람이 나쁜 건 아니잖아!

1000697956.english: As a result, it was found safely.

1000697958.english: After you finish the subjugation today, if you leave your bike maintenance to the gremlins and rest at our camp, I'll give you a bottle.
1000697958.korean: 오늘 토벌을 마친 후에, 그렘린에게 바이크 정비를 맡기시면서 저희 숙영지에서 쉬시면 한 병 드리겠습니다.

1000697962.english: Two bottles. That's as far as it goes.
1000697962.korean: 두 병. 이 이상은 안 됩니다.

1000697964.english: Instead, just make a masterpiece. It's better to drink alcohol with others than alone.
1000697964.korean: 대신에 대작이나 해달라고. 술은 혼자보다 여럿이서 마시는 게 좋으니까.

1000697966.english: The Valkyrie will drink half, so four bottles.
1000697966.korean: 발키리가 절반 마실 테니, 네 병.

1000697967.english: ...up to three bottles. That's as far as it goes.

1000697970.english: Let's quickly tidy up and have a drink while watching the opening ceremony broadcast of the film festival!
1000697970.korean: 후딱 정리하고 영화제 개막식 중계 보면서 한 잔 하자고!

1000697971.english: There's even a movie where I appear!

1000697972.english: Orca yearns! Twelve o'clock, my Orca!
1000697972.korean: 오르카는 갈망한다! 열두 시 내 오르카!

1000697973.english: Hello, Orca and all the Bioroids & AGS from Europe!

1000697974.english: This is Spriggan reporter from Orca at twelve o'clock.
1000697974.korean: 열두 시 내 오르카의 스프리건 기자입니다.

1000697975.english: Hello. I'm DJ Orangeade from OraOra.

1000697980.english: It's shorter than usual, isn't it?

1000697981.english: I made a big slip of the tongue recently, and Alpha-nim said that if I say anything strange from now on, they'll censor me strictly...
1000697981.korean: 얼마 전에 말실수 크게 해서 알파님께서 이상한 소리하면 앞으로는 검열 빡빡하게 하겠다고 하셔서요…

1000697982.english: As long as you don't say anything strange, right?

1000697983.english: Do you think I won't say anything strange?
1000697983.korean: 제가 이상한 소리 안 할 것 같나요?

1000697986.english: Then I'll have to fill in the audio as much as possible.

1000697989.english: For whom are you making this movie!

1000697990.english: The Orca Film Festival, a feast of Orca art, has grandly opened its doors!
1000697990.korean: 오르카 예술의 향연 오르카 필름 페스티벌이 화려한 막을 올렸습니다!

1000697991.english: This film festival will kick off with an opening performance by the world's top idol group, the Sky Knights, followed by famous actors from Densetsu and Bismark!
1000697991.korean: 이번 영화제는 세계 최고의 아이돌 그룹인 스카이 나이츠의 개막 공연을 시작으로 덴세츠와 비스마르크의 유명한 배우들!

1000697992.english: And above all, the commander, the first and last human, graced us with their presence and brightened the occasion.
1000697992.korean: 그리고 그 무엇보다도 최초이자 최후의 인간님이신 사령관님께서 참석하셔서 자리를 빛내주셨습니다.

1000697993.english: Also, this film festival will be held not only offline but also online for those who cannot attend the venue...
1000697993.korean: 또한 이번 영화제는 오프라인뿐만 아니라 행사장에 참여하지 못하는 분들을 위해서 온라인으로도……

1000697995.english: - Therefore, further detailed commentary will be omitted.
1000697995.korean: - 그러므로 더 이상 자세한 중계는 생략한다.

1000697996.english: - Although grand, the opening ceremony was skipped by those who weren't interested, and each member went to watch a movie that piqued their interest.
1000697996.korean: - 성대하긴 하지만 관심있는 사람이 아니라면 지루해 할 개막식은 대충 넘기고 각 대원들은 자신들의 흥미를 끄는 영화를 관람하러 갔다.

1000697997.english: Have you ever seen the movie "Dutch Girl"?

1000697998.english: I couldn't see it back then. I came to Orca and saw a few.
1000697998.korean: 옛날에는 못 봤는데. 오르카에 와서 하나둘 봤어.

1000697999.english: I hardly ever watch it alone, but Circe often asks me to watch it with her.
1000697999.korean: 혼자는 거의 안 보는데 키르케가 자주 같이 보자고 하거든.

1000698002.english: When we were at the external base and couldn't go outside because of the blizzard, we all gathered in the dining hall and watched movies together.
1000698002.korean: 외부 거점에 있을 때 눈보라 때문에 밖에 못 나가면 식당에 모두 모여서 같이 영화를 봤어.

1000698003.english: I've also seen movies about fighting monsters at an isolated base.
1000698003.korean: 고립된 기지에서 괴물과 싸우는 영화도 봤고.

1000698004.english: The bodyguard and the person being protected even went to see a movie they both liked.
1000698004.korean: 경호원이랑 경호대상이랑 서로 좋아하는 영화도 봤어.

1000698006.english: Shall I show you what Orca's science fiction is like?

1000698007.english: If the science is wrong, I'll write a long review and send it.
1000698007.korean: 과학 고증 틀리면 장문 리뷰 작성해서 보내야지.

1000698008.english: I heard that if you nitpick about historical accuracy all the time, you won't be able to enjoy the movie properly...
1000698008.korean: 고증 같은 거 사사건건 따지면 영화 제대로 못 본다고 하던데…

1000698009.english: It's okay! Checking for historical accuracy is part of the fun of watching a movie.
1000698009.korean: 괜찮아! 고증 따지는 것도 영화를 보는 묘미니까.

1000698010.english: Oh, do you want some popcorn?

1000698011.english: I ate a lot of popcorn.

1000698012.english: My dryad sister made a lot for me.

1000698013.english: Was the movie with the Doctor and LRL in the next time slot after the next one?
1000698013.korean: 닥터랑 LRL이 나오는 영화가 다다음 시간대였나?

1000698015.english: That's amazing. Because someone I know is in the movie.
1000698015.korean: 신기해. 아는 사람이 영화에 나온다고 하니까.

1000698016.english: Huh? Bismark and the legendary sisters and brothers are there too, right?
1000698016.korean: 응? 비스마르크랑 덴세츠 언니, 오빠들도 있잖아.

1000698017.english: That's true, but seeing people who were in movies from a long time ago is different from seeing someone you know in a new movie.
1000698017.korean: 그렇긴 한데… 옛날에 찍은 영화에 출연했던 사람들을 보는 거랑 아는 사람이 새로운 영화에 나오는 것을 보는 거랑 느낌이 달라.

1000698018.english: I can't explain it, but I just have a feeling.
1000698018.korean: 뭐라고 설명은 못하겠는데 뭔가 느낌이 그래.

1000698019.english: The siblings of Dentsetsu and Bismark were originally created to film the work, right?
1000698019.korean: 덴세츠랑 비스마르크의 언니 오빠들은 원래 작품을 찍기 위해서 만들어졌잖아.

1000698020.english: On the other hand, LRL was originally created to manage lighthouses. I was made for something... secret.
1000698020.korean: 반면에 LRL은 원래 등대를 관리하기 위해서 만들어졌고. 나는… 비밀스러운 뭔가를 위해 만들어졌잖아.

1000698021.english: Could it be that you felt strange because you were doing something other than your original purpose for being born?
1000698021.korean: 태어난 본래의 목적이 아닌 다른 활동을 해서 이상한 느낌을 받은 거 아닐까?

1000698024.english: If you'd like to know more, our research-
1000698024.korean: 더 자세히 알고 싶으면 우리 연구-

1000698026.english: Circe said not to do anything else, but definitely not to be a graduate student of alcohol, tobacco, or the Doctor.
1000698026.korean: 키르케가 다른 건 몰라도 술, 담배, 닥터의 대학원생은 하지 말라고 했어.

1000698028.english: Since Circe said that, and she likes alcohol, we could drag her to our lab, right?
1000698028.korean: 그렇게 말한 키르케 언니는 술 좋아하니까 우리 연구실로 끌고 와도 되겠네?

1000698029.english: Then, I hope Circe will quit drinking too, now that she has this opportunity...
1000698029.korean: 그러면 이번 기회에 키르케도 술을 끊었으면 좋겠는데…

1000698031.english: - All characters appearing in this work are fictional. Even if similarities exist, we clarify that they are the result of coincidence.
1000698031.korean: - 본 작품에 등장하는 인물은 모두 허구입니다. 만일 유사성이 존재한다 해도, 이는 우연의 결과라는 것을 밝힙니다.

1000698033.english: (The world was peaceful again, and civilization began to flourish once more.)
1000698033.korean: (세상은 다시 평화로워졌고, 문명은 다시 번성하기 시작했다.)

1000698034.english: (We, who were artificially created, continued our new lives in this world.)
1000698034.korean: (인공적으로 만들어진 우리는 이 세상에서 새로운 삶을 이어나갔다.)

1000698037.english: (Height: 150cm) Weight... I haven't weighed myself recently, so I don't know.

1000698042.english: (I am teaching the androids born before and after the war.)

1000698044.english: These days, even androids have a bit of a temper!

1000698046.english: There's no need to be so sharp.

1000698047.english: Because I have no intention of scolding you at all.

1000698049.english: Sometimes in life, you might not get your homework done.
1000698049.korean: 살다 보면 숙제 정도는 안 해올 수도 있죠.

1000698051.english: I know I'm not the only one with homework.
1000698051.korean: 숙제가 제 것만 있는 건 아니라는 것을 알고 있어요.

1000698052.english: Even with math homework, just because you have unlimited time doesn't guaranty you'll be able to solve it.
1000698052.korean: 수학 숙제라는 것도 시간이 계속 주어진다고 확실하게 풀리는 것도 아니고요.

1000698053.english: If you have any questions, feel free to come and ask anytime.
1000698053.korean: 모르는 것이 있으면 얼마든지 물어보러 오세요.

1000698054.english: The faculty office is always open.

1000698056.english: Hmph! Who would learn something that's useless in this kind of life!
1000698056.korean: 흥! 누가 이딴 삶에 도움도 안 되는 거 배울까 보냐!

1000698060.english: That child needs an education. Very much.
1000698060.korean: 저 아이에게는 교육이 필요하겠네. 매우 많이.

1000698062.english: Teaching students isn't easy, is it?

1000698063.english: Wouldn't it have been better managing the kids in the military?
1000698063.korean: 차라리 군대에서 애들 관리할 때가 더 나았죠?

1000698067.english: Even if I can forgive not being good at studying to some extent, I'll have to correct the lack of good manners.
1000698067.korean: 그래도 공부를 못하는 것은 어느 정도 용서를 할 수 있어도, 예의가 바르지 못하는 것은 교정해야겠네요.

1000698068.english: How about it, Mr. Leprechaun? Would you mind letting me take care of that child?
1000698068.korean: 어때요, 레프리콘 선생님? 저 아이 저에게 맡겨주지 않으시겠어요?

1000698069.english: Thank you for offering to help, but...

1000698070.english: They're my students, so I have to put in the effort.

1000698071.english: Being a good person alone isn't enough to be a teacher.

1000698072.english: Would you like to borrow my whip if you need it?

1000698073.english: No. I'll try teaching it my way.

1000698074.english: I won't forget that you tried to help me.

1000698080.english: Sorry. I've been so absorbed in my club activities that...
1000698080.korean: 미안. 부 활동에 너무 열중하다 보니.

1000698081.english: Do you want to play a game with us, teacher?

1000698082.english: I'm sorry, but I don't think this outfit will work.
1000698082.korean: 죄송하지만 이 복장으로는 힘들 것 같네요.

1000698083.english: Thank you for recommending it anyway.

1000698084.english: But have you seen Sylphide by any chance?

1000698086.english: Well... I just wanted to chat a bit.

1000698087.english: I wanted to have a few words with you because you didn't do your homework, but I guess it sounded like I was scolding you.
1000698087.korean: 숙제를 안 해온 것이 있어서 몇 마디 나누려고 했는데 그게 혼내는 것처럼 들렸나 봐요.

1000698088.english: What? There's nothing we can do about that.

1000698089.english: Not doing homework is definitely wrong from a student's perspective.
1000698089.korean: 숙제를 안 해오는 건 학생의 입장에선 잘못한 게 맞는 거니까.

1000698090.english: If you think that way, no matter what anyone says, it'll sound like you're being scolded, won't it?
1000698090.korean: 그렇게 생각하고 있으면 무슨 소리를 들어도 혼내키는 것처럼 들릴 걸?

1000698092.english: I'm not here. But our THN is designed to teach martial arts to someone, isn't it?
1000698092.korean: 나는 없어. 하지만 우리 티에치엔은 누군가에게 무술을 가르치기 위해서 설계 되었잖아.

1000698093.english: As expected... perhaps it's better for teachers to be androids designed as teachers?
1000698093.korean: 역시… 교사는 교사로 설계된 바이오로이드가 맡는 게 나을까요?

1000698094.korean: 음… 나는 그렇게 생각 안 하는데?

1000698096.english: Look. Do I look like I'm about to teach someone martial arts right now?
1000698096.korean: 봐봐. 내가 지금 누구한테 무술 가르칠 것처럼 생겼어?

1000698097.english: Doesn't it look like anyone can see she's not focused on the tennis club activities?
1000698097.korean: 누가 봐도 테니스 부 활동에 열중하는 학생으로 보이지 않아?

1000698100.english: What do you mean by that?

1000698101.english: I was created on the premise of the possibility of someone changing, the possibility of education.
1000698101.korean: 나는 누군가가 변할 수 있는 가능성, 즉 교육의 가능성을 전제로 만들어졌어.

1000698102.english: So, I acknowledge the possibility that anyone can change.
1000698102.korean: 그래서 누구나 변할 수 있는 가능성이 존재하는 것을 긍정하지.

1000698103.english: And isn't that the same for the teacher?

1000698104.english: Didn't you become a teacher because you believed in that possibility?
1000698104.korean: 그 가능성을 믿기에 교사가 된 거 아냐?

1000698111.english: Hehe, then give me a break from homework later.
1000698111.korean: 헤헤, 그러면 나중에 숙제 좀 면제해줘.

1000698112.english: The classes are moving so fast these days.

1000698113.english: When Tiequan was a martial arts instructor, would she let someone skip practice if they asked?
1000698113.korean: 티에치엔이 무술 사범일 때, 누가 연습을 빼달라고 하면 빼줄 건가요?

1000698115.english: Hoo hoo. That's how it is.

1000698116.english: Still, if you have any questions, I'll be happy to answer them anytime.

1000698119.english: But how can I properly talk to the Sylphid?
1000698119.korean: 하지만 어떻게 해야 실피드랑 제대로 대화를 할 수 있을까?

1000698120.english: It feels like they're refusing to even talk to me...
1000698120.korean: 저와의 대화 자체를 거부하는 거 같은데…

1000698124.english: Oh, victory. Is this Sergeant Leprechaun calling?

1000698125.english: You know just by hearing the voice, Brownie.

1000698126.english: And it's been a while since I was discharged. Do you still call her Sergeant?
1000698126.korean: 그리고 전역한 지가 언젠데. 아직도 중사님이라고 부르나요?

1000698127.english: Isn't Brownie higher in rank now?
1000698127.korean: 지금은 브라우니가 계급이 더 높지 않나요?

1000698128.english: Once a senior, always a senior, right?
1000698128.korean: 한 번 선임은 영원한 선임 아님까.

1000698130.english: Can I not call unless I have a reason?

1000698131.english: I just called because I wanted to hear your voice, Sergeant.
1000698131.korean: 그냥 중사님 목소리 듣고 싶어서 전화했슴다.

1000698132.english: ...And which of your subordinates is giving you trouble?

1000698134.english: Have we spent a day or two together?

1000698135.english: Then, Sergeant, do you have any worries too?

1000698137.english: Hehe, I'm quick on the uptake too.

1000698138.english: Weren't we together during that war?
1000698138.korean: 그 전쟁을 같이 겪은 사이 아님까.

1000698143.english: When the steel wire breaks, everything collapses!
1000698143.korean: 강철의 전선이 무너지면 모든 것이 무너진다!

1000698144.english: E, Efreeti Sergeant Major! Shell supply!

1000698145.english: Stack them over there where the artillery shells are piled up!
1000698145.korean: 거기 포탄 쌓아 둔 곳에 쌓아줘!

1000698147.english: New swarm of Iron Blooded Beasts at the 7th bunker, two o'clock!
1000698147.korean: 7번 벙커 두 시 방향에 새로운 철충 무리!

1000698148.english: Includes a mammoth! Watch out for enemy shelling!
1000698148.korean: 매머드 포함! 적 포격에 주의할 것!

1000698150.english: They say bombing is impossible because there's a risk of friendly fire!
1000698150.korean: 아군 오폭 가능성이 있어 폭격은 불가능하다고 합니다!

1000698151.english: The Metal Parasite jumps into the trench!

1000698152.english: Steel Line Assault Regiment! Fix bayonets!

1000698153.english: Aaaah! There are too many Iron Beetles!

1000698156.english: Oh no. If we keep talking like this, we'll just keep reminiscing.
1000698156.korean: 아차. 이러다가 계속 옛날 이야기만 하겠슴다.

1000698157.english: So, what kind of complaints do you want me to listen to?

1000698158.english: Hehe, didn't I tell you? I just wanted to hear your voice, Sergeant.
1000698158.korean: 헤헤, 말하지 않았슴까. 중사님 목소리 듣고 싶었을 뿐이라고.

1000698159.english: And didn't the sergeant already teach me the solution to my problem?
1000698159.korean: 그리고 제 문제는 이미 중사님께서 해결법을 가르쳐 주지 않았슴까?

1000698160.english: What solution are you referring to?

1000698161.english: Even if I have a troublesome subordinate, I remain patient and continue to communicate with them steadfastly.
1000698161.korean: 속 썩이는 부하가 있어도 인내심을 가지고 꿋꿋하게 대화를 한다.

1000698162.english: Then, someday, that subordinate will also proudly contribute their share.
1000698162.korean: 그러면 언젠가 그 부하도 당당히 한 사람 몫을 하게 된다.

1000698164.english: The brownies were in the oven for too long.

1000698166.english: That troublesome subordinate is now a colonel, you know.
1000698166.korean: 그 속 썩이던 부하가 이제는 대령이지 말임다.

1000698167.english: Brownie is a colonel? Steel Line's status has really fallen.
1000698167.korean: 브라우니가 대령이라니… 스틸라인도 위상이 많이 떨어졌네요.

1000698168.english: Doesn't that mean it's a peaceful world?

1000698174.english: Because Brownie taught me the answer to the problem I'm currently worrying about.
1000698174.korean: 지금 하고 있는 고민의 답을 브라우니가 가르쳐 줘서요.

1000698175.english: Hehe, isn't it a good thing to have a good successor?
1000698175.korean: 헤헤, 후임 잘 두고 볼일 아님까?

1000698176.english: If you ask if they're a good successor...

1000698181.english: It feels like I'm being forced to bow down.

1000698182.english: I've been working on this until such a late hour.
1000698182.korean: 이런 너무 늦은 시간까지 붙잡고 있었슴다.

1000698187.english: Yeah, I have my own way, don't I?

1000698189.english: Hmm! It's a super hip piece, no matter when you see it.
1000698189.korean: 음! 언제 봐도 초 힙한 작품이라니까.

1000698190.english: I drew it, but it's really cool.

1000698191.english: Heh, did Sylphid draw all of this?

1000698196.english: I just want to talk to the Sylph.

1000698197.english: No matter what you say, I'm not going to attend the teacher's class!
1000698197.korean: 무슨 소리를 해도 선생 수업은 안 들어!

1000698198.english: Yes, it's okay if you don't listen.

1000698200.english: If Sylphid doesn't need math for what she wants to do, then she doesn't necessarily have to take math classes.
1000698200.korean: 실피드가 하고 싶은 일에 수학이 필요하지 않다면 구태여 수학 수업을 들을 필요는 없겠죠.

1000698201.english: You are the student, and I am the teacher.

1000698202.english: You were born after the war, and I'm from the generation that experienced it.
1000698202.korean: 당신은 전후에 태어났고, 저는 전쟁을 겪은 세대지만.

1000698204.english: I just came because I wanted to talk to the Sylph.
1000698204.korean: 저는 단지 실피드랑 대화를 하고 싶어서 왔어요.

1000698205.english: I have nothing to say to the teacher.

1000698206.english: I have a lot to say.

1000698207.english: It wasn't just for show that they experienced the war.
1000698207.korean: 그냥 멋으로 전쟁을 겪은 건 아니에요.

1000698208.english: What kind of old-fashioned nonsense are you going to say?

1000698209.english: Oh my? Thanks to experiencing the war, I know a lot of interesting stories that people born after the war don't know, you know?
1000698209.korean: 어머? 전쟁을 겪은 덕분에 전후에 태어난 분들은 모르는 재밌는 이야기를 많이 알고 있답니다?

1000698212.english: Oh. Looking at the picture reminds me.

1000698213.english: Shall I tell you about the time I used your body as a canvas and drew all sorts of pictures on it?
1000698213.korean: 인간님의 몸을 캔버스 삼아 이런 저런 그림을 그렸던 일을 이야기 해드릴까요?

1000698218.english: It happened on an island somewhere in the summer.

1000698221.english: (Height: 150cm) My weight... well, it's actually gone up a bit recently, which is a concern.
1000698221.korean: (신장 150cm. 체중은…… 사실 최근에는 조금 늘어나서 고민이다.)

1000698226.english: (I am teaching the androids born before and after the war.)

1000698227.english: (And they'll continue to teach new children many things in the future.)
1000698227.korean: (그리고 앞으로도 계속 새로운 아이들에게 여러가지를 가르치겠지.)

1000698228.english: (In the peaceful world we fought for and won.)

1000698230.english: - Watching the movie, a mix of emotions washed over me.

1000698231.english: - Various thoughts were swirling in my head, making it difficult to organize them.
1000698231.korean: - 여러가지 감상이 머릿속에서 떠돌아다녀 정리가 잘 되지 않았다.

1000698232.english: - But one thing definitely came to mind.
1000698232.korean: - 하지만 한 가지 분명하게 떠오르는 것은 있었다.

1000698233.english: - So I asked the director next to me.
1000698233.korean: - 그래서 나는 내 옆에 있는 감독에게 물었다.

1000698236.english: When considering the artistic merit, I thought the message would be clearer if the commander didn't appear, so I edited it out.
1000698236.korean: 작품성을 생각했을 때 사령관이 등장 하지 않는 쪽이 더 메시지가 분명하다고 생각해서 편집한 거야.

1000698237.english: Don't be too disappointed, I'll send you the complete version later, where the commander also appears.
1000698237.korean: 나중에 사령관도 등장하는 완전판 따로 보내줄 테니까 너무 섭섭하게 생각하지 마.

1000698238.english: Still, even tho it didn't appear in the movie, the fact that you spent quality time with the leprechaun doesn't change, does it?
1000698238.korean: 그래도 영화에는 등장 안 했지만 레프리콘과 오붓한 시간을 보낸 것은 변하지 않잖아.

1000698239.english: - Accidental meeting, accidental reunion, date, confession, kiss...
1000698239.korean: - 우연한 만남, 우연한 재회, 데이트, 고백, 키스…

1000698240.english: - I filmed enough for another movie.
1000698240.korean: - 영화 한 편 더 나올 정도로 찍었는데.

1000698241.english: - And although I didn't take any pictures, I got carried away by the atmosphere and went even further...
1000698241.korean: - 그리고 찍지는 않았지만 분위기에 취해서 그 다음까지…

1000698244.english: - You must be busy right now, as you're currently hunting Metal Parasites.
1000698244.korean: - 지금 철충 토벌하고 있는 중이라 바쁠 텐데.

1000698245.english: Oh, the flashback scene about the war in the middle?

1000698246.english: Of course. Because it really does have combat footage inserted.
1000698246.korean: 당연하지. 진짜 전투 영상 삽입한 거니까.

1000698247.english: If you don't have a budget, you have to resort to these kinds of tricks.

1000698249.english: - Even considering it's a short film, a short shooting period, a novice director, and novice actors...
1000698249.korean: - 단편, 짧은 촬영 기간, 초보 감독, 초보 배우들이라는 것을 감안해도…

1000698250.english: Tch! I wanted to hear it called a masterpiece.

1000698254.english: What did you think of our first work?
1000698254.korean: 우리의 첫 작을 본 소감은 어때?

1000698256.english: I'm sorry my acting wasn't good enough.

1000698257.english: Hahaha! It's okay. It's okay. I was lacking too, so it's the same for me.
1000698257.korean: 하하하하! 괜찮아. 괜찮아. 부족한 건 나도 마찬가지였으니까.

1000698258.english: You can do better next time.

1000698259.english: Um... would you like to take another picture with me next time?

1000698260.english: Well, I don't know, but since we've already worked together once, maybe we'll have another chance?
1000698260.korean: 음, 모르겠지만 한 번 합을 맞춰봤으니 그럴 기회가 또 있지 않을까?

1000698262.english: If we ever make another movie with the leprechaun, I'll make sure to cast the commander as the male lead, no matter what.
1000698262.korean: 레프리콘이랑 다시 영화를 찍게 되면 무슨 일이 있어도 남자 주인공으로 사령관 섭외할게.

1000698264.english: Oh, come on, that's just how this work turned out due to unavoidable circumstances.
1000698264.korean: 에이, 이번 작품은 부득의한 사정에 의해서 그렇게 된 거라고.

1000698265.english: Please look forward to Director Werewolf's next film, Commander.

1000698267.english: Perfect. The best driver is waiting, so all you have to do is come out.
1000698267.korean: 완벽하지. 베스트 드라이버가 대기하고 있으니까, 나오기만 하면 돼.

1000698269.english: Then that's a modifier that suits me very well.
1000698269.korean: 그럼, 나한테 아주 잘 어울리는 수식어지.

1000698270.english: ...the person who drove the vintage car they stole last time and crashed it over a cliff must be...
1000698270.korean: …저번에 훔친 빈티지 자동차 운전하다가 절벽 아래로 떨어뜨린 사람이 분명…

1000698271.english: Hey! Forget about those old things and just focus on your work.
1000698271.korean: 어허! 그런 옛날 일은 잊어버리고, 일에나 집중하라고.

1000698272.english: The security devices are all disabled, so all that's left is the safe.
1000698272.korean: 보안 장치는 다 해제해 놨으니까, 금고만 처리하면 돼.

1000698273.english: ...Okay. Okay... I'll count to five, grab the items, and escape through the window.
1000698273.korean: …좋아. 그럼… 다섯까지 세면 물건 들고 창문으로 빠져나갈게.

1000698275.english: Don't you think that's a bit strange yourself?!
1000698275.korean: 본인이 생각하기에도 그거 좀 이상하지 않아?!

1000698277.english: ...They said the vehicle was ready, but a bicycle?

1000698278.english: Did you know that according to the Road Traffic Act, bicycles are also classified as vehicles?
1000698278.korean: 도로교통법상으로는 자전거도 차량으로 분류된다는 사실, 알고 있었니?

1000698279.english: It's my fault for expecting too much.

1000698281.english: Phantom Thief N... and her accomplice, Nicky Tracy! Because they're so elusive, we've missed them every time so far...
1000698281.korean: 괴도 N… 그리고 그 협력자인 니키 트레이시! 워낙 신출귀몰한 탓에 그 동안은 번번히 놓쳤지만…

1000698282.english: This time, I'll definitely arrest you!

1000698283.english: Oh no, it's Detective Lee Ann. The security devices should all be shut down, so how did they know to come here...?
1000698283.korean: 이크, 리앤 형사잖아. 보안 장치는 다 멈춰 놨을 텐데, 어떻게 알고 온 거람…

1000698284.english: Neodym, are you ready? Let's run away right now!

1000698285.english: Ha, you're going to escape on a bicycle? Knowing that would happen, we prepared motorcycles on this side!
1000698285.korean: 하, 자전거로 도망가시겠다? 그럴 줄 알고 이쪽은 오토바이를 준비해 뒀거든!

1000698288.english: Oh, you mean Annie the sheriff, the red-haired girl, right? I introduced her to a bar I know, and she left me this note. Here, take it.
1000698288.korean: 아, 애니 보안관이면 그 빨간 머리 아가씨 말하는 거지? 내가 아는 술집을 좀 소개해줬더니, 나한테 이 쪽지를 주고 가더라고. 자, 받아.

1000698290.english: This is... 'I'm going to find a place that sells amazing whiskey and have a quick drink'?
1000698290.korean: 이건… ‘끝내주는 위스키를 팔고 있는 집을 찾아서, 잠깐 한 잔 하고 올게’…?

1000698293.english: ...Whew, Detective Leanne... I never thought she'd actually run to catch up with us.
1000698293.korean: …휴, 리앤 형사… 설마 뛰어서 우리를 따라올 거라고는 생각도 못 했는데 말이지.

1000698294.english: You really have to give them credit for their perseverance.

1000698295.english: What were those papers they scattered at the end that made Detective Lee faint?
1000698295.korean: 마지막에 뿌린 종이들은 뭐길래 리앤 형사가 기절한 거야?

1000698296.english: Oh, that? Remember last time when Detective Leanne and her partner went undercover at the casino, pretending to catch us?
1000698296.korean: 아, 그거? 저번에 리앤 형사가 우리를 잡는답시고 카지노에 잠입했을 때 기억나?

1000698297.english: Yeah. You were wearing a bunny girl outfit.

1000698298.english: Actually, I secretly took photos back then, you know? So I just spread that photo around.
1000698298.korean: 사실 내가 그 때 사진을 몰래 찍어뒀거든? 그래서 그 사진을 뿌렸을 뿐이야.

1000698300.english: Haha, well, I make a living by stealing in the first place. Okay, let's forget about that for now and see what's in the safe today...
1000698300.korean: 하핫, 애초에 도둑질로 먹고 사는데 뭐. 자, 그건 이제 잊어버리고, 오늘 금고에는 뭐가 들었는지 확인해 보자고…

1000698302.english: Whew, you're right. At this rate, there must be about 650 in here, right? I won't have to worry for a while.
1000698302.korean: 휘유, 그러게. 이 정도면 대략 650개 정도 들어 있겠는데? 당분간 걱정 없겠어.

1000698305.english: This... at first glance, it looks like a can of tuna, but... it's not a can of tuna.
1000698305.korean: 이거… 얼핏 보면 참치캔처럼 생겼지만… 참치캔이 아니야.

1000698306.english: That's impossible. If you look at the ingredients and content section here, it clearly says tuna...
1000698306.korean: 그럴 리가 있나. 여기 원재료명 및 함량 칸을 보면 분명히 참치라고…

1000698308.english: Wait a minute, is this a mackerel can and not a tuna can? Counterfeit money?
1000698308.korean: 잠깐만, 이거 참치캔이 아니라 꽁치캔이야? 위조화폐라고?

1000698309.english: So all the trouble we went through today was for nothing?
1000698309.korean: 우리가 오늘 한 고생이 전부 다 헛수고였다고?

1000698310.english: It's not that kind of problem.

1000698311.english: The way it's so intricately made... it's definitely organized crime.
1000698311.korean: 이렇게 정교하게 만들어진 모양새… 분명 조직적인 범죄일 거야.

1000698312.english: ...We need to track down the organization making counterfeit money and root it out.
1000698312.korean: …위조화폐를 만드는 조직을 추적해서 뿌리를 뽑아야 해.

1000698313.english: Ugh... do you really have to go that far? Can't we just consider today a bust and go rob somewhere else?
1000698313.korean: 어우… 굳이 그렇게까지 해야 해? 오늘은 허탕쳤다고 생각하고 다른 곳을 털러 가면 안 되는 거야?

1000698314.english: Mr. NiBA said this. They say that if the economy collapses due to counterfeit money, the biggest losers will be the thieves themselves.
1000698314.korean: 니바 선생님이 이렇게 말하셨어. 위조화폐로 경제가 망가질 경우 가장 큰 타격을 받는 건 도둑들이라고.

1000698316.english: They say that since thieves are people who redistribute wealth to eliminate economic inequality, the stronger the economy, the more stable their job life will be.
1000698316.korean: 도둑은 경제적 불평등을 타파하기 위해 부의 재분배를 실현하는 사람이니까, 경제가 탄탄할수록 더 안정적인 직업 생활을 누릴 수 있대.

1000698317.english: ...Sometimes I think your teacher is a truly amazing person.
1000698317.korean: …난 가끔 너희 선생님이라는 사람이 참… 대단한 사람인 것 같아.

1000698318.english: Anyway... you're saying we should take on the organization that's making counterfeit money, right? Okay, fine. It sounds like fun, so I'll join in too.
1000698318.korean: 아무튼… 위조화폐를 만드는 조직이랑 한 판 해 보자 이거지? 뭐, 좋아. 재밌을 것 같으니까, 나도 끼도록 할게.

1000698319.english: Then we should go to the Duchy of Baniostro, right?

1000698320.english: The Duchy of Baniostro? Why are you going there?

1000698321.english: It's written here in the origin section.

1000698322.english: You know, 'Made in the Duchy of Baniostro'.

1000698324.english: Well, as the teacher said... good is good.
1000698324.korean: 뭐, 선생님 말씀대로… 좋은 게 좋은 거니까.

1000698325.english: Once you pass that tunnel in front of you, you'll be in the Duchy of Baniostro. Before we go in, I'll give you a quick briefing.
1000698325.korean: 눈 앞의 저 터널만 지나가면 바니오스트로 공국이야. 들어가기 전에, 간략하게 브리핑 진행할게.

1000698326.english: The Duchy of Bagneux is ruled by the Duchess of Bagneux. She's the second daughter of the Duke of Baniostro.
1000698326.korean: 바니오스트로 공국은 바니오스트로 여공작이 다스리는 곳이야. 바니오스트로 공작의 둘째 딸이지.

1000698328.english: Yes, my eldest daughter left the family and is running her own business. What... I think I heard they even make and sell bouquets, and also sell flower petals to scatter at weddings? So, my younger brother inherited the family.
1000698328.korean: 응, 첫째 딸은 가문을 나와서 개인 사업을 하고 있거든. 무슨… 꽃다발도 만들어서 팔고, 결혼식 때 뿌리는 꽃잎도 팔고 한다던 거 같던데? 그래서 가문을 동생이 물려받게 되었지.

1000698329.english: But that business did incredibly well, and now she's the richest person in Orca. Now there are so many people who want to buy bouquets that you can't even get one by giving away a can of tuna.
1000698329.korean: 헌데 그 사업이 엄청나게 잘 되어서, 지금 오르카에서 제일 부자가 되었어. 이제는 꽃다발을 구매하겠다는 사람이 너무 많아서, 참치캔을 주고도 못 사는 수준이라고 하더라고.

1000698330.english: Thank you. Are there any other unusual points?
1000698330.korean: 고마워. 그 밖에 특이한 점이 있을까?

1000698331.english: Not really. Even tho it's a duchy, they don't even have soldiers... The previous Duke of Baniostro was just a wealthy eccentric businessman who bought an old castle and then declared himself a duke.
1000698331.korean: 딱히. 공국이라고 해도 병사들을 데리고 있는 것도 아니니까… 전대 바니오스트로 공작은 그냥 돈 많은 괴짜 사업가였는데, 오래 된 성을 구매하고 나서 공작을 자처했을 뿐이거든.

1000698332.english: Then... I'll have to break into the Duchess's room tonight.
1000698332.korean: 그렇다면… 오늘 밤 바로 여공작의 방에 침입해야겠네.

1000698333.english: Be careful, Neodym. They say the Duchess has the ability to control ice, so a head-on confrontation might be dangerous.
1000698333.korean: 조심해, 네오딤. 여공작은 얼음을 조종하는 능력이 있다던데, 정면 승부는 위험할지도 몰라.

1000698334.english: Don't worry too much. I'll slip out without being noticed, so don't worry.
1000698334.korean: 너무 걱정하지 마. 안 들키게 잘 빠져나올 거니까.

1000698337.english: (Since it seems like no one's here right now, I should quickly set up the surveillance equipment and get out.)
1000698337.korean: (지금은 아무도 없는 것 같으니, 빠르게 감시용 장비를 설치하고 빠져나가야겠어.)

1000698338.english: (First, if we install listening devices there... and there...)

1000698340.english: Gnome. I hope the production of the saury cans is going smoothly.
1000698340.korean: 노움. 꽁치캔 생산은 순조롭게 진행되고 있겠지?

1000698341.english: Of course. It was made so perfectly that it was indistinguishable from a can of tuna, so no one would have noticed it was counterfeit money.
1000698341.korean: 그야 물론이죠. 참치캔과 구분이 안 갈 정도로 완벽하게 만들어져서, 위조화폐라는걸 눈치챈 녀석들은 없을 거예요.

1000698343.english: Um... but, Duke. Excuse me, but aren't you already wealthy, Duke? Despite that, this counterfeit money... may I ask why you're making canned mackerel?
1000698343.korean: 저… 그런데, 공작님. 실례지만, 공작님은 이미 부자시잖아요? 그런데도 불구하고 이 위조 화폐… 꽁치캔을 만드는 이유를 여쭤봐도 괜찮을까요?

1000698345.english: What would happen if we continue to produce canned saury and collect canned tuna like this?
1000698345.korean: 이대로 계속 꽁치캔을 생산하고, 참치캔을 수집한다면 어떻게 될까?

1000698346.english: Hmm... well, I suppose all the tuna cans would be replaced with mackerel pike cans, right?
1000698346.korean: 으음… 글쎄요, 참치캔이 전부 꽁치캔으로 바뀌게 되겠죠?

1000698347.english: If the current trend continues... in three days, all the tuna cans in Orca will be replaced with mackerel cans.
1000698347.korean: 지금 추세로 가면… 사흘 뒤면 오르카 내의 모든 참치캔이 꽁치캔으로 바뀌게 될 거예요.

1000698349.english: And when all the internal communications on the Orca are replaced with canned mackerel... that's when we announce it to the press.
1000698349.korean: 그리고 오르카 내부 통화가 전부 꽁치캔으로 바뀌었을 때… 그 사실을 언론에 발표하는 거지.

1000698350.english: Then the value of currency within Orca will plummet, and the value of the tuna cans the Duchess has will skyrocket.
1000698350.korean: 그럼 오르카 내부의 통화 가치는 바닥을 칠 거고, 여공작이 가진 참치캔의 가치는 엄청나게 높아지게 될 거야.

1000698351.english: If we were to acquire Rhea's business using the tuna cans the Duchess has at that time...
1000698351.korean: 그 때 여공작이 가진 참치캔으로 레아의 사업체를 인수한다면…

1000698352.english: ...So, you can take your sister's business with just a pittance!
1000698352.korean: …푼돈으로도 언니 분의 사업을 빼앗을 수 있겠군요!

1000698354.english: (Trying to confuse Orca because of a sisterly squabble... what a truly wicked person.)
1000698354.korean: (자매 싸움 때문에 오르카를 혼란에 빠뜨리려 하다니… 정말 사악한 사람이네.)

1000698355.english: (I need to stop making counterfeit money as soon as possible...)
1000698355.korean: (위조 화폐 제조를 한 시라도 빨리 멈춰야겠어…)

1000698356.english: (Then... in the way of Phantom N... I'll put an end to this sisterly feud.
1000698356.korean: (그렇다면… 괴도 N의 방식으로... 이 자매싸움을 끝내주겠어.)

1000698357.english: Wow, this room is incredibly luxurious!

1000698358.english: Is this here made of real gold? Wow, that's amazing...
1000698358.korean: 여기 이건 진짜 금으로 만들어진 건가? 우와, 엄청난데…

1000698359.english: ...Annie the sheriff? Wouldn't it be better to focus on the case? And you were late again this morning.
1000698359.korean: …애니 보안관? 사건에 집중하는 편이 좋지 않을까? 오늘 아침에도 지각했으면서 말이야.

1000698360.english: Ahaha, sorry, sorry. It's the first time I've seen something like this, so I'm just...
1000698360.korean: 아하하, 미안, 미안. 이런 걸 보는 건 처음이라서 그만.

1000698362.english: Anyway... Duke. You're saying Phantom Thief N sent a crime announcement?
1000698362.korean: 아무튼… 공작님. 괴도 N이 범죄 예고장을 보내왔다고요?

1000698363.english: Okay. They were insolently saying they would rob the Duchess's treasure vault...
1000698363.korean: 그래. 건방지게도 여공작의 보물고를 털겠다고 하던데…

1000698364.english: I hope they'll make sure there's no chance of that happening.
1000698364.korean: 그럴 일 없게 확실히 경비해줬으면 좋겠어.

1000698365.english: ...We're the police, not security guards, you know...?

1000698366.english: Aren't the police and security guards basically the same?

1000698367.english: If the treasure vault's security is breached, I'll contact your superiors, so please manage it with extra care.
1000698367.korean: 보물고 보안이 뚫리면 당신네 상사에게 연락할 테니까, 각별히 신경 써서 관리해.

1000698369.english: What kind of woman is that?!

1000698370.english: Why are you getting stressed out over something like that? If we have time for that, let's think about how to stop N.
1000698370.korean: 뭘 그런 걸로 스트레스를 받고 그래? 그럴 시간 있으면 N을 어떻게 막을지 생각해 보자고.

1000698372.english: With Nicky Tracy around, the security measures are practically useless. So, in the end, we have to stop N by going out there and doing it ourselves...
1000698372.korean: 니키 트레이시가 있으니까, 보안 장치는 무의미하다고 봐야 해. 결국 우리가 발로 뛰어서 N을 막아야 한다는 건데…

1000698373.english: If N were to come, it would definitely be the rooftop or the back gate of the castle. Since there are two of us, it would be better if we each take a spot and guard it.
1000698373.korean: N이 올 만한 곳이라면 역시 옥상 아니면 성 뒷문이겠지. 우리도 마침 두 명이니까, 각자 한 곳 씩 맡아서 지키는 편이 좋겠어.

1000698374.english: Then I'll take care of the rooftop security. If I had my hoverbike, I could chase N even if she flew away.
1000698374.korean: 그럼 내가 옥상 경비를 맡을게. 내 호버 바이크가 있으면 N이 날아서 도망치더라도 쫓을 수 있을 테니까.

1000698375.english: Okay, then I'll watch the back gate of the castle. This time, you can't get distracted, okay?
1000698375.korean: 좋아, 그럼 성 뒷문 쪽은 내가 감시하고 있을게. 이번에는 딴짓하면 안 된다?

1000698376.english: Ahaha, why are you worrying about something like that? Don't worry too much. Surely I wouldn't make the same mistake twice?
1000698376.korean: 아하하, 뭘 그런 걱정을 하고 그래? 너무 걱정하지 마. 설마 내가 두 번이나 실수하겠어?

1000698380.english: I think we're far enough away now.

1000698381.english: I don't need to disguise myself anymore.

1000698382.english: Nicky, please disable the security devices in the treasure vault.

1000698384.english: See? 5 seconds are counted like this, Neodym!

1000698385.korean: 하나 둘 다섯이 더 나은 것 같은데…

1000698388.english: It seems like they're not coming this way after all. Should I go support the anime side...?
1000698388.korean: 아무래도 이 쪽으로는 안 오는 것 같네. 애니 쪽에 지원을 가야 하나…

1000698389.english: Huh? Who are you going to support?

1000698390.english: ...What? You said you were guarding the roof, so why are you here?

1000698391.english: Ahaha, well... I overslept a bit and that's why I'm late. Sorry!
1000698391.korean: 아하하, 그게… 조금 늦잠을 자서 늦었어. 미안!

1000698392.english: Oversleeping? Are you late? The Phantom Thief N has appeared now, what the...?!
1000698392.korean: 늦잠? 늦자암? 지금 괴도 N이 나타났는데 무슨…!

1000698393.english: Wait a minute, if the anime sheriff is here right now, then who have I been with all this time...?
1000698393.korean: 잠깐만, 지금 애니 보안관이 여기 있다면, 그럼 여태까지 내가 같이 있던 건…

1000698394.english: The treasure vault is in danger!

1000698395.english: Duchess Titania! We need to go to the treasure vault!

1000698396.english: What? What are you talking about all of a sudden?

1000698397.english: Phantom Thief N has broken into the treasure vault!

1000698399.english: Yes, yes. You'll be disciplined later, so let's go to the treasure vault!
1000698399.korean: 네, 네. 나중에 징계받을 테니까, 보물고로 가시죠!

1000698403.english: N factorial There's nowhere to run! Quietly put on the handcuffs...
1000698403.korean: N! 도망칠 곳은 없다! 얌전히 수갑을…

1000698404.english: Wait a minute, they said it was a treasure trove... what is this?

1000698405.english: It's a device for making counterfeit money. You mean the counterfeit currency that the Duchess Titania is making?
1000698405.korean: 위조 화폐를 만드는 장치지. 티타니아 여공작이 만드는 위조 화폐 말이야.

1000698407.english: Huff...! So, I said, "Huk, stop it...!"

1000698408.english: What were you, gasp, doing, that you can run, gasp, so well...?
1000698408.korean: 뭘, 허억, 하길래, 이렇게, 허억, 잘 뛰어…?

1000698409.english: Oh, I'm sorry. Since I'm in charge of walking Cerberus, I get a lot of cardio exercise.
1000698409.korean: 아, 죄송합니다. 켈베로스 산책 담당이 저라서 유산소 운동을 엄청 하거든요.

1000698411.english: ...Anyway, you ended up seeing the duchess's secret after all.
1000698411.korean: …그나저나, 결국 너도 여공작의 비밀을 봐 버렸네.

1000698412.english: Now... I have no choice but to handle everything.
1000698412.korean: 이젠… 전부 처리할 수 밖에 없겠어.

1000698413.english: Ugh?! Because of the ice... the gun froze!

1000698415.english: Phantom Thief N, you will be dealt with right here and now...
1000698415.korean: 괴도 N, 너는 이 자리에서 바로 처리하고…

1000698416.english: Officer, especially you, we'll say you died in the line of duty while capturing Phantom Thief N.
1000698416.korean: 경관 특별히 너는 괴도 N을 잡다가 순직한 걸로 해 줄게.

1000698417.english: - At the critical moment when Neo-dim and Leanne's bodies were about to be covered in ice...
1000698417.korean: - 네오딤과 리앤의 몸이 얼음에 뒤덮이려는 정체절명의 순간…

1000698419.english: - Annie, who made a grand entrance, rammed Titania with her bike, sending her flying far away!
1000698419.korean: - 멋지게 등장한 애니가 바이크로 티타니아를 들이받아 저 멀리 날려버렸다!

1000698420.english: Murder in front of the sheriff? Not a chance.

1000698422.english: Haha, sorry! I was late again because I was trying to figure out the situation.
1000698422.korean: 하핫, 미안! 이번에도 상황 파악 좀 하느라 늦었어.

1000698423.english: But it's not too late at the decisive moment.

1000698424.english: Honestly, I wish I had come a little earlier.
1000698424.korean: 정말이지, 조금만 더 빨리 왔으면 좋았을 텐데 말이야.

1000698425.english: Anyway, N is frozen too, so... we might as well arrest N while we're at it.
1000698425.korean: 아무튼, 얼어붙은 건 N도 마찬가지니까… 이 기회에 N까지 체포하면 되겠네.

1000698426.english: Anyway, N... you deliberately led me here, didn't you?
1000698426.korean: 그나저나 N… 너, 일부러 여기로 나를 유도한 거지?

1000698427.english: Okay. Actually... the crime announcement was fake. Because they were trying to lure Detective Lee Ann here.
1000698427.korean: 그래. 사실… 범죄 예고장은 페이크였어. 리앤 형사를 여기로 끌어들이려고 한 거거든.

1000698428.english: ...If that's the case, you should report the crime instead of announcing it.
1000698428.korean: …그런 거면 범행 예고를 하는 게 아니라, 범죄 신고를 하라고.

1000698429.english: It seemed like it would take a long time until the warrant came out...
1000698429.korean: 영장이 나올 때까지 오래 걸릴 것 같기도 했고…

1000698430.english: It's weird for a thief like me to report it to the police station, isn't it?
1000698430.korean: 도둑인 내가 경찰서에 신고하는 건 이상하잖아?

1000698431.english: What's wrong? Since you're confessing, you might as well report it too.
1000698431.korean: 뭐가 이상해? 자수하는 김에 신고도 할 수도 있는 거지.

1000698432.english: Anyway, this is the end of me being involved with you. Don't worry, the police station will melt the ice for you.
1000698432.korean: 아무튼, 이제 너랑 엮이는 것도 끝이네. 얼음은 경찰서에서 잘 녹여줄 테니까, 걱정하지 마.

1000698434.english: Of course! You're trapped in ice and you're trying to escape?
1000698434.korean: 그럼! 얼음 속에 갇혀 있는데 도망가려고?

1000698437.english: Ta-da! I've come to save you, Neodym!

1000698438.english: Cough, cough... Blow up the city walls with bombs? These ignorant fools...
1000698438.korean: 콜록, 콜록… 성벽을 폭탄으로 날려버려? 이 무식한 녀석들…
